fields.name: Journal Template Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the journal template that the Payment Registration window is based on.

fields.name: Journal Batch Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the journal batch that the Payment Registration window is based on.

fields.name: Bal. Account Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of account that is used as the balancing account for payments. The field is filled according to the selection in the Journal Batch Name field.

fields.name: Bal. Account No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the account number that is used as the balancing account for payments.

fields.name: Use this Account as Def.
fields.tooltip: Specifies if the account in the Bal. Account No. field is used for all payments.

fields.name: Auto Fill Date Received
fields.tooltip: Specifies if the Date Received and the Amount Received fields are automatically filled when you select the Payment Made check box.
